subcodes.title: Words to Charles and Mariam Haney spoken in Feb. 1909
subcodes.first_line: My gardens are the hearts and souls. The hearts are everlasting rose gardens. Its flowers will never wither
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
